init.title: SmartIR options
init.description:
Update the UI-configured SmartIR entity and adjust repeat timing for a selected command.

For Zigbee2MQTT IR remotes, use the `/set` topic such as `zigbee2mqtt/Salon_IR/set`.

error.invalid_command_overrides: Command overrides must be valid JSON.
error.test_failed: The test command could not be sent. Check the controller selection and controller data.
